entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A resilient drought-tolerant cereal crop grown throughout West Africa, especially in the Sahel.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is grown.

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: Region in West Africa where pearl millet is a major staple food and suffers from chronic insect pests.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to survive in the poorest soils and driest regions.

entities.name: BIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Biological factors that limit crop growth, including insect pests.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to crops, such as the stem borer and millet head miner.

entities.name: STEM BORER
entities.description: Coniesta ignefusalis, a major chronic insect pest of millet in the Sahel that causes dead hearts, stand loss, and lodging.

entities.name: MILLET HEAD MINER
entities.description: Heliocheilus albipunctella, a major chronic insect pest of millet in the Sahel that feeds on the panicle.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in the Sahel where millet pests are present.

entities.name: POACEAE
entities.description: The grass family on which the stem borer develops.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period during which the stem borer and millet head miner develop on pearl millet.

entities.name: DEAD HEARTS
entities.description: Damage caused by first generation larvae of the stem borer.

entities.name: STAND LOSS
entities.description: Damage caused by first generation larvae of the stem borer.

entities.name: LODGING
entities.description: Damage caused by second and third generation larvae of the stem borer.

entities.name: VASCULAR SYSTEM DISRUPTION
entities.description: Damage caused by second and third generation larvae of the stem borer.

entities.name: GRAIN FORMATION INHIBITION
entities.description: Damage caused by both the stem borer and the millet head miner.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The environment where the millet head miner spends the remainder of the season in diapause.

entities.name: DRIER ZONES
entities.description: Areas of the Sahel where infestations of the millet head miner are more severe.

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: Reduction in crop output caused by insect pests, ranging from 15% to 85%.

entities.name: TRICHOGRAMMATOIDEA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A parasitoid that is a potential candidate for biological control of the millet head miner.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of a parasitoid to manage the population of the millet head miner.
